moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Finals Day
moments.blurb: The final day of The Championships, Wimbledon, sees the culmination of two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Wimbledon Champions
angles.copy: Wimbledon has crowned its champions for 2026! Who lifted the trophies today at the All England Club? What a two weeks it’s been!

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: As the final serves are made and champions are decided, it's time for one last round of strawberries and cream. What's been your favourite moment from Wimbledon 2026?

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially kicks off its practice days today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, ahead of the main tournament from July 16-19.

angles.name: Golf Major Kicks Off
angles.copy: The world's best golfers are descending on Royal Birkdale! Practice days for The Open Championship 2026 are officially underway.

angles.name: Who to Watch
angles.copy: Who are you backing for the Claret Jug this year? The Open Championship practice rounds have begun at Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Break Chart Record
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' logs its 16th non-consecutive week at UK No.1, breaking Wet Wet Wet's 32-year record for a British act.

angles.name: New Chart Record
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean’s 'Rein Me In' is No.1 for a 16th week, smashing a long-standing British chart record. Incredible!

angles.name: Top 10 Update
angles.copy: Beyond the record-breaking No.1, Olivia Rodrigo, Ariana Grande, Michael Jackson, and Ella Langley are all in the UK Top 5. What's your favourite right now?

moments.title: ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: New moody thriller 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres tonight on ITV and ITVX, set in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: New ITV Drama
angles.copy: Get ready for some chills! New thriller 'The Dark' premieres tonight on ITV, taking us deep into the Scottish wilderness. Will you be tuning in?

angles.name: Tonight's TV Pick
angles.copy: Your Sunday night TV sorted! 'The Dark' is the brand new drama hitting ITV tonight. Perfect for a mysterious evening in.

moments.title: BBC Comedy 'Ann Droid' Debuts
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new quirky comedy 'Ann Droid' premiered yesterday on BBC, following a grieving widow and her eldercare robot.

angles.name: Catch Up on Ann Droid
angles.copy: Did you catch Diane Morgan's new BBC comedy 'Ann Droid' yesterday? It's already got people talking about its witty, offbeat premise!

angles.name: New BBC Comedy
angles.copy: If you missed it, 'Ann Droid' is the new BBC comedy bringing laughs with Diane Morgan and a socially awkward robot. Worth a watch!

moments.title: System of a Down London Residency
moments.blurb: Iconic rock band System of a Down begin a three-night residency at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London from tomorrow, July 13-15.

angles.name: SOAD Live in London
angles.copy: System of a Down fans, get ready! The band kicks off their three-night London residency at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium tomorrow!

angles.name: Rocking Tottenham
angles.copy: Three nights of System of a Down are coming to London! Who's heading to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium for their epic shows?

moments.title: My Chemical Romance Wembley Shows
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance performed at Wembley Stadium on July 10 & 11, concluding their UK leg of the 'Long Live The Black Parade' tour.

angles.name: MCR Wembley Recap
angles.copy: Did you make it to My Chemical Romance at Wembley over the weekend? What an incredible few nights for the 'Long Live The Black Parade' tour!

angles.name: Wembley Rocked
angles.copy: Wembley Stadium was alive with My Chemical Romance energy! Share your highlights from their massive UK shows.

moments.title: Sammy Hagar's UK Tour Concludes
moments.blurb: Sammy Hagar & The Best of All Worlds, with special guest Joan Jett & The Blackhearts, concluded their UK arena tour on July 9 at London's O2.

angles.name: Red Rocker UK Wrap
angles.copy: Sammy Hagar wrapped up his 'Best of All Worlds' UK tour last week, bringing rock legends to arenas across the country! Who caught him live?

angles.name: Joan Jett & The Blackhearts
angles.copy: Joan Jett & The Blackhearts joined Sammy Hagar on his recent UK tour, reminding us why they're rock icons! What's your favourite Jett track?

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Wales This Week
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a music and arts festival with over 130 acts, is set to take place in Monmouthshire, Wales, from July 16-19.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is bringing music, arts, and good vibes to Monmouthshire this week! Who's heading to the Welsh countryside for the fun?

angles.name: Monmouthshire Calling
angles.copy: Over 130 acts across 6 stages! Big Love Festival kicks off in Wales on July 16th. Get ready for a diverse weekend of entertainment!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, is set to celebrate traditional and contemporary Celtic music from July 15-18.

angles.name: Celtic Fest Kicks Off
angles.copy: Stornoway is gearing up for the Hebridean Celtic Festival, starting July 15th! A fantastic celebration of music and culture in the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Looking for some incredible music and Scottish charm? The Hebridean Celtic Festival is nearly here! Who's making the trip?

moments.title: Splendour & Bassfest This Weekend
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival in Nottingham and Bassfest in Sheffield both take place this coming weekend, July 18-19, offering diverse music across the UK.

angles.name: Festival Weekend Ahead
angles.copy: Double the festival fun this weekend! Splendour Festival in Nottingham and Bassfest in Sheffield are both happening July 18-19. Where will you be?

angles.name: Sheffield & Nottingham
angles.copy: From Wollaton Hall to Don Valley Bowl, the Midlands and Yorkshire are buzzing with festival excitement this weekend! Splendour or Bassfest?

moments.title: Liz Mitchell (Boney M.) is 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of legendary disco group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liz Mitchell
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the iconic voice of Boney M., Liz Mitchell, who turns 74 today! What's your favourite Boney M. hit?

angles.name: Disco Legend
angles.copy: From 'Daddy Cool' to 'Rivers of Babylon', Liz Mitchell's voice defined an era. Happy 74th Birthday to the Boney M. legend!

moments.title: John Petrucci (Dream Theater) is 59
moments.blurb: John Petrucci, the acclaimed guitarist and co-founder of progressive metal band Dream Theater, celebrates his 59th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday John Petrucci
angles.copy: Happy 59th Birthday to the incredible John Petrucci of Dream Theater! A true guitar virtuoso. What's your favourite Dream Theater track?

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating John Petrucci's 59th birthday today! His influence on progressive metal is undeniable. Keep shredding!

moments.title: Dan Reynolds (Imagine Dragons) is 39
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the lead singer of Grammy-winning rock band Imagine Dragons, turns 39 on Tuesday, July 14th.

angles.name: Imagine Dragons Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Imagine Dragons frontman Dan Reynolds turns 39 on Tuesday. What's your favourite track from the band?

angles.name: Dan Reynolds Turns 39
angles.copy: From 'Radioactive' to 'Believer', Dan Reynolds has given us some massive anthems. Happy 39th Birthday for Tuesday!

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday, July 15th.

angles.name: Happy 80th Linda Ronstadt
angles.copy: An incredible milestone! The legendary Linda Ronstadt turns 80 on Wednesday. What a voice, what a career!

angles.name: Music Icon Turns 80
angles.copy: From 'You're No Good' to 'Blue Bayou', Linda Ronstadt's music spans generations. Wishing her a very happy 80th Birthday for July 15th!

moments.title: Richard Marx is 63
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for his 80s and 90s pop-rock hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 63rd birthday on Thursday, July 16th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Richard Marx
angles.copy: Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Richard Marx on Thursday! Which of his classic power ballads is your favourite?

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Still 'Right Here Waiting' for another Richard Marx hit! Wishing a very happy 63rd to the pop-rock legend for July 16th.

moments.title: Michelle Williams (Destiny's Child) is 46
moments.blurb: Michelle Williams, Grammy-winning singer and member of Destiny's Child, will celebrate her 46th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Destiny's Child Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to Jumpin', Jumpin'! Michelle Williams of Destiny's Child celebrates her 46th birthday on Monday. What's your favourite DC track?

angles.name: Michelle Williams Turns 46
angles.copy: From 'Survivor' to solo success, Michelle Williams has had an incredible career. Happy 46th Birthday for July 20th!

moments.title: Don Henley (Eagles) is 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, legendary drummer and vocalist for The Eagles, will turn 79 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend Turns 79
angles.copy: The voice behind so many Eagles classics! Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday. Which Eagles song is your anthem?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Don Henley
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's legacy is immense. Wishing him a very happy 79th for July 22nd!

moments.title: Selena Gomez is 34
moments.blurb: Actress and pop superstar Selena Gomez will celebrate her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Selena Gomez Turns 34
angles.copy: Pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday! What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Selena
angles.copy: From Disney star to global music icon, Selena Gomez has done it all. Wishing her a fabulous 34th Birthday for July 22nd!
